Assignment2

Question 1

library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
Loading required package: iterators
Loading required package: parallel
library(parallel)
library(MASS)
library(iterators)
library(boot)
#Define a function that returns the mean and variance of a vector
stats<- function(x){
  smean<- mean(x)
  svariance<- var(x)
  vec<- c(smean,svariance)
  return(vec)
}
result<- foreach(i=1:100,combine=rbind)%do%{
  sampled<- rexp(5000,1)
  stats(sampled)
}
result
[[1]]
[1] 1.006738 1.001392

[[2]]
[1] 1.0068350 0.9830663

[[3]]
[1] 1.033403 1.017512

[[4]]
[1] 1.0019396 0.9981248

[[5]]
[1] 0.9780101 0.9710119

Question 2

cl<- makeCluster(4)
registerDoParallel(cl)

#Set no of Bootstrapping samples
B<- 1000

#Parallel bootsrapping
system.time(result2<- foreach(i=1:B,combine=rbind,.packages = 'MASS')%dopar%{
  
  median(sample(galaxies,replace =TRUE))
})
   user  system elapsed 
   0.17    0.10    0.36 
stopCluster(cl)

#Serial bootstrapping for comparison 
system.time(result2<- foreach(i=1:B,combine=c,.packages = 'MASS')%do%{
  
  median(sample(galaxies,replace =T))
})
   user  system elapsed 
   0.23    0.01    0.29

Question 3

set.seed(1234)

tsamples<- rexp(n=50,rate=1)

truemean<- 1

B<- 1000

cover<-0 #No of confidence intervals
  
for(i in 1:1000)
  {
  sampled<- rexp(50,1)
  
 
  bootmean<- function(data, indices) {       #Bootstrap samples
    return(mean(data[indices]))
 }

  bootres <- boot(sampled,bootmean,R=B)
  
  
  #percentile bootsrap
  cint<- boot.ci(bootres,type="perc")$percent[4:5]
  
  if (!is.null(cint) && truemean >= cint[1] && truemean <= cint[2]) {
    cover <- cover + 1
    
  }
  
}

#Estimated coverage probability

cov.prob<- cover/1000 

cov.prob
[1] 0.929

Question 4

set.seed(1234)


random_vectors_list <- as.list(irnorm(5, count = 3))#  iterator output to  list 

# Register a parallel backend 
num_cores <- parallel::detectCores(logical = FALSE)
if (num_cores > 1) {
  cl <- makeCluster(min(2, num_cores))  # Use up to 2 cores
  registerDoParallel(cl)
} else {
  registerDoSEQ() 
}

# Use foreach 
results <- foreach(v = random_vectors_list, .combine = c) %dopar% {
  max(v)
}

# Stop the parallel cluster
if (exists("cl")) stopCluster(cl)

results
[1] 1.0844412 0.5060559 0.9594941

Question 6

set.seed(1234)

random_vectors_list <- as.list(replicate(3, rnorm(5), simplify = FALSE))# Generate random vectors


num_cores <- detectCores(logical = FALSE)# Register parallel backend
cl <- makeCluster(min(2, num_cores))
registerDoParallel(cl)


system.time({
  res_parLapply <- parLapply(cl, random_vectors_list, max)  # parLapply
})
   user  system elapsed 
      0       0       0 
system.time({
  result_foreach <- foreach(v = random_vectors_list, .combine = c) %dopar% { #Using foreach with %dopar%
    Sys.sleep(0.001)
    max(v)
  }
})
   user  system elapsed 
   0.03    0.00    0.05 
# Using replicate
system.time({
  result_replicate <- sapply(random_vectors_list, max)
})
   user  system elapsed 
      0       0       0 
# Stop the cluster
stopCluster(cl)
